AI Feedback Calibration Approval rates by scan source · updates in real time
Every approve/reject decision trains the AI. Sources with <15% approval (after 5+ decisions) are automatically suppressed. Sources with >70% approval get boosted confidence scores.

No feedback data yet — approve or reject items to calibrate the AI

Suppressed Sources Sources the AI has learned to ignore
Suppressed scan sources are silenced — Helios will not queue new items from them until the suppression is lifted. Reset calibration to re-enable all sources.
